description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Log in, search for cafés near a specified ZIP code, and set the nearest location within 5 miles as your favorite store.
tasks.name: Log in, search for cafés near a specified ZIP code, and set the nearest location within 5 miles as your favorite store.
tasks.description: Log in, search for cafés near a specified ZIP code, and set the nearest location within 5 miles as your favorite store.

tasks.instruction: Create a new customer account with a new email and password, complete the sign-up form, and open the account dashboard for that new account.
tasks.name: Create a new customer account with a new email and password, complete the sign-up form, and open the account dashboard for that new account.
tasks.description: Create a new customer account with a new email and password, complete the sign-up form, and open the account dashboard for that new account.

tasks.instruction: Log in, select any medium latte, choose a pickup time for tomorrow between 8:00 and 9:00 AM that is closest to 8:30 AM, and add it to your order for pickup.
tasks.name: Log in, select any medium latte, choose a pickup time for tomorrow between 8:00 and 9:00 AM that is closest to 8:30 AM, and add it to your order for pickup.
tasks.description: Log in, select any medium latte, choose a pickup time for tomorrow between 8:00 and 9:00 AM that is closest to 8:30 AM, and add it to your order for pickup.

tasks.instruction: Log in, open your past orders, find the lowest-priced drink in size Large, and add one of that drink to a new order.
tasks.name: Log in, open your past orders, find the lowest-priced drink in size Large, and add one of that drink to a new order.
tasks.description: Log in, open your past orders, find the lowest-priced drink in size Large, and add one of that drink to a new order.

tasks.instruction: Log in, add a new payment card to your wallet, and set that newly added card as your default payment method.
tasks.name: Log in, add a new payment card to your wallet, and set that newly added card as your default payment method.
tasks.description: Log in, add a new payment card to your wallet, and set that newly added card as your default payment method.

tasks.instruction: Log in, go to your rewards, filter to bakery items, and redeem points for one bakery reward priced under $5 with a rating of at least 4 stars.
tasks.name: Log in, go to your rewards, filter to bakery items, and redeem points for one bakery reward priced under $5 with a rating of at least 4 stars.
tasks.description: Log in, go to your rewards, filter to bakery items, and redeem points for one bakery reward priced under $5 with a rating of at least 4 stars.

tasks.instruction: Log in, open notification settings, turn off promotional email and all push notifications, and enable only SMS notifications for order status updates before saving your changes.
tasks.name: Log in, open notification settings, turn off promotional email and all push notifications, and enable only SMS notifications for order status updates before saving your changes.
tasks.description: Log in, open notification settings, turn off promotional email and all push notifications, and enable only SMS notifications for order status updates before saving your changes.

tasks.instruction: Log in with your current password, go to security settings, change your password to a new value, then log out and sign in again using the new password to confirm the change.
tasks.name: Log in with your current password, go to security settings, change your password to a new value, then log out and sign in again using the new password to confirm the change.
tasks.description: Log in with your current password, go to security settings, change your password to a new value, then log out and sign in again using the new password to confirm the change.
